title: Network Engineer - Riverbed WAN Optimisation - 8k
description:
about the job. As a Senior Network Infrastructure Specialist, you will manage complex network environments to ensure client traffic remains highly performant and secure.

  • Manage the deployment and ongoing maintenance of advanced wide area network optimization tools to enhance connectivity
  • Develop and enforce infrastructure security protocols and standards in alignment with global industry best practices.
  • Partner with various internal and external stakeholders to guarantee that critical network traffic is both efficient and protected.
  • Research emerging vulnerabilities and performance trends to proactively suggest and apply modern countermeasures.
  • Maintain comprehensive technical documentation regarding system configurations, operational processes, and incident response procedures.

skills and experience required.

  • Degree or Diploma in a technology-related discipline such as Computer Science or Information Security.
  • Advanced technical certifications in enterprise-level networking products, with a preference for wide area optimization specialists.
  • Proven experience implementing and managing large-scale network management platforms within an enterprise environment.
  • Deep understanding of network protocols and the application of security frameworks like NIST or CIS to hardware.
  • Strong analytical capabilities to troubleshoot complex connectivity incidents and the ability to manage multiple project priorities.

    To apply online please use the apply function, alternatively you may contact Chloe Chen at chloe.chen(@)randstad.com.sg. (EA: 94C3609 /R1768253)

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
